description: A Go SDK for interacting with Decentralized Identifier (DID) based Verifiable Credentials (VC) on the blockchain, providing factory, base NFT, and storage management capabilities.

vcfactory.purpose: Factory for issuing, burning, and managing verifiable credentials (Identity and Certificate types).

exported_types.name: VCFactory
exported_types.purpose: Main factory instance for communicating with the VC factory smart contract.

read_methods.name: GetAddress
read_methods.description: Returns the contract address.

read_methods.name: GetBlockchain
read_methods.description: Returns the blockchain instance.

read_methods.name: GetIdentityNFT
read_methods.description: Returns the address of the Identity NFT contract.

read_methods.name: GetCertificateNFT
read_methods.description: Returns the address of the Certificate NFT contract.

read_methods.name: GetIdentityTokenIds
read_methods.description: Retrieves identity token IDs for a given DID.

read_methods.name: GetCertificateTokenIds
read_methods.description: Retrieves certificate token IDs for a given DID.

write_methods.name: ApproveCredentialOrg
write_methods.description: Approves a credential by an organization.

exported_types.name: Options
exported_types.purpose: Credential type enumerator (Identity or Certificate).

exported_types.name: IssueCredentialParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for issuing a new credential.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: BurnCredentialParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for burning an existing credential.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: UpdateMetadataParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for updating credential metadata.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: RevokeCredentialParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for revoking a credential.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: ApproveCredentialOrgParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for organizational approval of a credential.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: ApproveCredentialParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for user approval of a credential.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: TokenIdsResult
exported_types.purpose: Structure containing a list of token IDs and the total count.

exported_types.name: CredentialMetadata
exported_types.purpose: Structure representing the metadata of a verifiable credential.

utility_functions.name: NewVCFactoryWithHNS
utility_functions.description: Creates a new VCFactory instance using HNS resolution.

exported_constants.name: Identity
exported_constants.purpose: Option value representing an Identity credential.

exported_constants.name: Certificate
exported_constants.purpose: Option value representing a Certificate credential.

nftbase.purpose: Base interaction layer for NFT-based credentials.

exported_types.name: NFTBase
exported_types.purpose: Base instance for interacting with NFT credential contracts.

read_methods.name: GetAddress
read_methods.description: Returns the contract address.

read_methods.name: GetBlockchain
read_methods.description: Returns the blockchain instance.

read_methods.name: IsCredentialValid
read_methods.description: Checks if a credential is valid.

read_methods.name: GetMetadata
read_methods.description: Retrieves metadata for a given token ID.

read_methods.name: GetCredentialsWithMetadata
read_methods.description: Retrieves metadata for a list of token IDs.

read_methods.name: GetUnclaimedTokenId
read_methods.description: Retrieves the unclaimed token ID hash.

read_methods.name: Exists
read_methods.description: Checks if a token ID exists.

read_methods.name: OwnerOf
read_methods.description: Returns the owner of a token ID.

read_methods.name: TotalTokensToBeClaimedByDid
read_methods.description: Returns the total number of tokens to be claimed by a DID.

read_methods.name: GetToBeClaimedTokensByDid
read_methods.description: Retrieves token IDs to be claimed by a DID.

read_methods.name: IsApprovedForAll
read_methods.description: Checks if an operator is approved for all tokens of an owner.

exported_types.name: MintParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for minting a credential NFT.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: BurnParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for burning a credential NFT.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: SetMetadataParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for setting metadata on a token.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: TransferFromParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for transferring a token.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: AddTokenToDIDParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for associating a token with a DID.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: RemoveTokenFromDIDParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for deassociating a token from a DID.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

exported_types.name: CredentialMetadata
exported_types.purpose: Structure representing the metadata of an NFT credential.

exported_types.name: CredentialsWithMetadataResult
exported_types.purpose: Structure containing token IDs and their corresponding metadata.

utility_functions.name: NewNFTBaseWithHNS
utility_functions.description: Creates a new NFTBase instance using HNS resolution.

vcstorage.purpose: Management of verifiable credential storage on-chain.

exported_types.name: VCStorage
exported_types.purpose: Main instance for communicating with the VC storage smart contract.

read_methods.name: GetAddress
read_methods.description: Returns the contract address.

read_methods.name: GetBlockchain
read_methods.description: Returns the blockchain instance.

read_methods.name: GetIdentityTokenCount
read_methods.description: Returns the number of identity tokens for a DID.

read_methods.name: GetCertificateTokenCount
read_methods.description: Returns the number of certificate tokens for a DID.

read_methods.name: GetIdentityTokenIds
read_methods.description: Retrieves identity token IDs for a given DID.

read_methods.name: GetCertificateTokenIds
read_methods.description: Retrieves certificate token IDs for a given DID.

read_methods.name: GetDIDRootStorage
read_methods.description: Returns the address of the DID root storage.

read_methods.name: GetDIDOrgStorage
read_methods.description: Returns the address of the DID organization storage.

write_methods.name: SetDidRootStorage
write_methods.description: Sets the DID root storage address.

write_methods.name: SetDidOrgStorage
write_methods.description: Sets the DID organization storage address.

exported_types.name: TokenIdsResult
exported_types.purpose: Structure containing a list of token IDs and the total count.

exported_types.name: SetAddressParams
exported_types.purpose: Parameters for setting contract addresses in storage.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts parameters to a slice of arguments for smart contract call.

utility_functions.name: NewVCStorageWithHNS
utility_functions.description: Creates a new VCStorage instance using HNS resolution.

utils.purpose: Common utilities and internal interfaces for the SDK.

exported_types.name: TxParams
exported_types.purpose: Interface for transaction parameter structures that can be converted to contract arguments.

read_methods.name: ToArgs
read_methods.description: Converts the transaction parameters to a slice of arguments.
